name: Scattergun
description: The Scattergun is a Jakobs shotgun built for close-quarters fights, delivering strong per-shot damage with a firing speed limited only by the trigger pull. Accuracy is middling to poor, and many variants carry just one or two shells, so you will be reloading often. Versions with a Tediore barrel typically fire fewer pellets, reducing overall damage and leaving them behind other Jakobs shotguns.
notes: Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
